title: Sales Executive (Freight Forwarding) #77821
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Freight Forwarding
  • Position Title: Sales Executive (Freight Forwarding)
  • Working Location: Central
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon – Fri, 8.00am – 5.30pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary up to $4,000 + Commission + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Schedule appointments and meet new customers to identify potential trade routes and offer company freight services
  • Conduct daily in-person sales presentations for both domestic and international freight services
  • Find and qualify new customers through research, networking, and cold-calling
  • Provide on-site demonstrations or presentations of the company’s freight services
  • Serve as the link between the company and customers to update on freight pricing and new trade routes
  • Prepare and provide quotations to customers promptly
  • Maintain professionalism and represent the company positively
  • Keep customer contact details and records updated accurately on the company drive
  • Prepare sales pipeline reports and maintain accurate expense accounts through weekly reports
  • Consistently follow up on new business opportunities
  • Work with the operations and documentation team to ensure cargo safety and correct billing for customer satisfaction
  • Follow up with clients on outstanding matters with support from the Finance Controller

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Diploma or Degree in Supply Chain, Logistics, or other related fields
  • Preferably 1 to 2 years’ experience in a similar position
  • Good organizational and coordination skills
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #77821 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
